title: How to integrate collaborative robots into existing production lines without disruption
description:
Dieter Pletscher of Kassow Robots shares advice for overcoming common hurdles in deploying collaborative robots.

The post How to integrate collaborative robots into existing production lines without disruption appeared first on The Robot Report.
